title: lithocarpus nodosus
intro: Lithocarpus nodosus, also known as the Bur Oak or Canyon Live Oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus nodosus lie in its leaves, bark, and roots, which contain compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus nodosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Lithocarpus nodosus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
